project_name: On The Tools - Cutting Edge Supplies
archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro + Archetype 7: Electric Neon

design_philosophy.rationale: An industrial, unapologetic, high-performance aesthetic targeted at professional tradesmen and B2B bulk buyers. Merges deep tactical obsidian blacks with high-visibility kinetic neon lime-green triggers. Cinematic, spark-filled motion design creates a $25,000 premium feel, distancing the brand from generic hardware stores.
criteria_25k: Custom framer-motion scroll sequences and parallax reveals
TSParticles integration for dynamic cutting sparks
Micro-interactions on all kinetic triggers (neon glow on hover)
Premium typographic tension (Massive brutalist headers vs technical body copy)

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none

rules: Headings must always be uppercase to convey industrial strength.
Overlines must be neon lime to create technical contrast.

surfaces.name: Tactical Card
surfaces.classes: bg-[#111111] border border-gray-800 rounded-none shadow-none hover:border-[#C6FF00]/50 transition-colors duration-300

surfaces.name: Neon Feature Strip
surfaces.usage: Highlight banners, marquee text, CTA blocks

animations.hero: Parallax scale-in with trailing TSParticles (sparks) emitting from the bottom right.
animations.scroll: Staggered fade-up for product grids using Framer Motion.
animations.hover: Buttons have a sharp transform (scale 1.05) with an intense neon drop-shadow: `hover:drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(198,255,0,0.6)]`.
animations.counters: Animated gauge counters for stats (e.g., '1M+ Cuts Made').

brand.description: Main Brand Logo. NOTE: Use CSS mix-blend-mode: screen or lighten to drop the black background if it is not naturally transparent.

hero_and_backgrounds.description: Time-lapse photography of person grinding during nighttime with massive sparks.
Dark brushed metal texture, industrial steel surface. Great for section backgrounds.
Man using a grinder on a piece of metal.
Cinematic 3D render of bright neon lime green sparks.

navigation.style: Sticky header with ultra-dark glassmorphism (bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-md) and a 1px solid bottom border (border-gray-800).

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2. Left: H1 'BUILT TO CUT. BUILT TO LAST.', Subtitle, primary CTA. Right: Product image hovering over sparks background.
sections.special: Overlay opacity bg-black/40 over the background image to ensure text pops.

sections.name: Feature Strip
sections.layout: Full width, solid bg-[#C6FF00], text-black. Use react-fast-marquee with 'INDUSTRIAL GRADE // CLEAN CUTS // HIGH SPEED // SAFER WORKING'.

sections.name: Product Range Strip
sections.layout: Bento Grid (3 columns). Seed products: 115mm 1mm disc, 115mm 3mm disc, 115mm 6mm grinding disc. Cards are dark carbon, product image centered, neon border on hover.

sections.name: Why Professionals Choose Us
sections.layout: Split layout. Left: Dark brushed metal texture bg, Gauge counters. Right: Testimonial cards with overlapping placement.

catalogue_page.layout: Filter sidebar (left, hidden on mobile) and Grid layout (right). Products displayed in sharp, cornerless dark cards. Images zoom slightly on hover.

product_detail_page.layout:
2-column grid. Left: Sticky image gallery. Right: Title, Specs, Description. 
Buttons MUST be structured as: 
1. 'Buy Now' -> bg-transparent border-2 border-[#C6FF00] text-[#C6FF00] (Amazon redirect)
2. 'Buy in Bulk' -> bg-[#C6FF00] text-black (Jumps to Trade Enquiries page).

trade_enquiries_page.layout: Centered constrained layout. Dark card container (bg-[#111111] p-8).

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (Messages, Products) + Main Content Area.
admin_dashboard.style: Strict dark technical grid, high density. No gradients.
features: Messages Inbox: View form submissions, Reply thread
Product CRUD: Add/Edit/Delete products, Image upload, Amazon URL input field.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C6FF00] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#AEE500] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all rounded-none
buttons.outline: bg-transparent text-[#C6FF00] border-2 border-[#C6FF00] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#C6FF00]/10 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all rounded-none

inputs.style: bg-[#111111] border border-gray-700 text-white rounded-none focus:border-[#C6FF00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C6FF00] placeholder:text-gray-600 px-4 py-3

components.testing_requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='buy-now-button', data-testid='trade-form-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for marketing sections (Home, Hero, Testimonials) to maintain the brutalist bento grids and strict asymmetry.
Use Shadcn UI for the Admin Panel, Forms, and Data Tables, heavily modifying them to remove round corners (rounded-none) and apply the dark tactical theme.
Implement TSParticles for the 'sparks' effect in the hero section.
Ensure 'Lenis' is used for premium smooth scrolling.
For the main logo image (.jpg), apply CSS 'mix-blend-mode: screen' or 'mix-blend-mode: lighten' if it has a solid black background to make it transparent against the dark nav.
Buttons on product pages must explicitly follow the specification: 'Buy Now' for Amazon links, 'Buy In Bulk' leading to the contact form.
Ensure total alignment with a $25k standard: micro-interactions on hovers, fluid typography, no default scrollbars.
